title: Enabling advanced therapeutic products and modernizing the regulation of clinical trials - Canada.ca
content:
## Agile regulations for advanced therapeutic products and clinical trials
Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from July 18, 2019 to September 30, 2019.
The goal of this consultation was to seek  feedback on what Health Canada should consider in developing new clinical  trials regulations as well as implementing the pathway for Advanced Therapeutic  Products. The department aimed to continue the conversation with stakeholders  and gathered other ideas to help ensure our approach supports innovation while  protecting the health and safety of Canadians.

## Join in: how to participate
Send an email to hc.hpfb.engagement-mobilisation.dgpsa.sc@canada.ca to request the consultation information document and questions by email.

## Who was the focus of this consultation
Health Canada engaged with:
- Other interested parties
